name: Enshrouded
author: ops@refx.example
description: Survival action-RPG voxel sandbox. SteamCMD-installed dedicated server (Windows build via Proton) configured through enshrouded_server.json.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 2278520 validate +quit
# Seed Enshrouded enshrouded_server.json from panel vars.
EJSON=/mnt/server/enshrouded_server.json
if [ ! -f "$EJSON" ]; then
  cat > "$EJSON" <<EOF
{
  "name": "${SERVER_NAME}",
  "password": "${SERVER_PASSWORD}",
  "saveDirectory": "./savegame",
  "logDirectory": "./logs",
  "ip": "0.0.0.0",
  "gamePort": ${SERVER_PORT},
  "queryPort": ${QUERY_PORT},
  "slotCount": ${MAX_PLAYERS}
}
EOF
fi
echo 'Enshrouded install complete.'

variables.description: Name shown in the in-game server browser.
Maximum concurrent player slots (Enshrouded supports up to 16).
Password required to join. Leave blank for an open server.

longDescription: Explore, build and battle through the Shroud with up to 16 players on a dedicated Enshrouded server.
